channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: VerifiedX brings privacy layer to Bitcoin as institutional demand for confidentiality grows
item.description: A new zero-knowledge-powered system enables shielded bitcoin transactions, reflecting a broader push across crypto to address the “privacy gap” keeping institutions off public blockchains.

item.title: UAE investors buy AI dip, keep crypto exposure despite conflict
item.description: UAE investors are buying the AI and tech dip, keeping exposure to software, chips and crypto as the Iran conflict stress-tests the Gulf’s bid to be a global tech hub.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: OneCoin’s fallout lingers as US victims get a shot at recovery
item.description: Investors in the cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme OneCoin may finally get some relief through a Department of Justice program, some 12 years after the project launched.

item.title: Why Australia’s $17B crypto opportunity depends on regulation
item.description: Australia’s A$24B digital asset opportunity hinges on regulation. Clear rules could drive tokenized markets, faster payments and institutional investment.

item.title: Naver-Dunamu filing sets IPO committee, listing timeline for fintech group
item.description: The corrected filing details timeline, caveats and conditions tied to a potential Naver Financial IPO after the Dunamu share swap deal.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price drops 1.3% as index trades lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), down 1.1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Ukraine arrests FBI-wanted cybercrime suspect, seizes $11M in assets
item.description: Ukrainian authorities detained a suspect linked to a $100 million cybercrime network targeting the US and Europe, seizing $11 million in assets, of which $3 million was in cryptocurrency.

item.title: Wall Street trading-tech is coming to crypto as DoubleZero rolls out high-speed data for Solana
item.description: The project, called DoubleZero Edge, offers a real-time feed of raw data from the Solana blockchain, giving traders faster access to information that can influence prices.

item.title: Drift gets $148 million funding from Tether and partners as it replaces Circle stablecoin with USDT after massive exploit
item.description: The money will be used by Drift to recover user funds after more than $270 million in clients assets were exploited this month, and will relaunch the protocol as a USDT-based perpetuals DEX on Solana.

item.title: AllUnity takes MiCA-regulated euro stablecoin EURAU further into DeFi
item.description: AllUnity says it is expanding EURAU stablecoin liquidity pools across major DEXs such as Uniswap and Raydium, with trading pairs against USDT and USDT0.

item.title: JUST IN: JPMorgan reports that the Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation is 'close to completion' 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE82Um82THFPR3l6SGF4Zjl1VnRYcXZhUDBVeXh0X0xMdDlqWVRFOHY4Qi1OQUhQWkl3UDExNHN1UVZuR1VSU0FtejQtbE5fb3ZxQmZ6MmVXR3lzcHNMNTlYUlRKTHZ2ekU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: JPMorgan reports t…

item.title: Adam Back says Bitcoin’s post-quantum shift may reveal true Satoshi stash
item.description: Back said at Paris Blockchain Week that Bitcoin’s post-quantum shift may reveal the true size of the stash held by Satoshi Nakamoto, estimated at between 500,000 and 1 million BTC.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Devs Propose New Quantum Solution
item.description: BIP-361 would freeze the Bitcoin most at risk of seizure from quantum exploits. But will the community go for it?

item.title: UK Sets Path to Crypto Regulation With FCA Consultation
item.description: The regulator is seeking feedback on its interpretation of regulated cryptoasset activities under rules set to take effect in October 2027.

item.title: We now display Bitcoin Per Share (in sats) on our site: 205,812. $MSTR - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE81MVVvbGk0SzhwSHprQmQtWU91d1BtaGhqNkEzZ3hKdlVFaURfMm96Zng2c3JjT0w5UDluY01FNjg2VU43SlhDU2Y1QzBXbnVpd0czZjJBZ0g3a3c?oc=5" target="_blank">We now display Bitcoin Per Share (in sats) …

item.title: Europe’s Bitcoin treasury playbook won’t be a copy of Strategy: PBW 2026
item.description: Executives at Paris Blockchain Week said European firms interested in Bitcoin treasury strategies are working around shallower capital markets and tighter constraints than in the US.

item.title: Exchange Inflows Spike as Bitcoin Faces $76K Headwinds
item.description: On-chain data show increased selling pressure, with Bitcoin exchange inflows and large-holder deposits spiking to multi-month highs.

item.title: Keep an eye on XRP, Plasma, DOGE as bitcoin drifts
item.description: What you need to know for April 16, 2026

item.title: Circle CEO sees ‘tremendous opportunity’ for yuan stablecoin despite China curbs
item.description: Circle’s Jeremy Allaire sees “tremendous” room for a yuan stablecoin, despite China banning most private yuan tokens and pushing its CBDC to challenge US dollar stablecoins.

item.title: Bitcoin funding rates hit most negative since 2023, history suggests bottom is in
item.description: Despite a surge in short positioning, bitcoin has climbed toward $75,000, with past episodes of negative funding rates often aligning with local market bottoms.

item.title: Bitcoin accumulator demand just hit 373,000 BTC. Smart money is absorbing supply at the highest pace. This is what accumulation looks like before a major supply crunch. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE50N2NYUy05b2VWNlJSYlhsNHMzY2E2SzJhMW9TSFVsMWo0b2dTWndiWENJa3JsXzg2WFdab1FQN3pORkpPbjZOR1JkWGU3eGZ3cnlnM1dqcFIxQWpMYTFlSnNsSjRqZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin accumulator demand j…

item.title: French minister says new measures are coming after crypto kidnappings
item.description: Jean-Didier Berger said at Paris Blockchain Week that France is preparing new steps to protect crypto holders as wrench attacks and kidnappings keep mounting.

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $75,000 as short-term holders look for profit opportunities
item.description: Bitcoin is hovering near $75,000 as steady institutional demand meets a wall of supply, while the options market is biased toward downside hedges.

item.title: Adam Back Pushes for Optional Upgrades to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
item.description: The Blockstream CEO’s approach contrasts with BIP-361, a proposal that would implement mandatory freezes of quantum-vulnerable Bitcoin.

item.title: Study finds almost no crypto protocols disclose market-maker terms
item.description: A review of over 150 crypto protocols finds fewer than 1% disclose market-making arrangements, revealing a major transparency gap in token trading structures.

item.title: South Korea to test blockchain deposit tokens for government spending in Q4
item.description: Token-based payments can be programmed with spending limits and which industries can use them, reducing audits and lowering transaction fees by removing intermediaries.

item.title: The cheapest bitcoin ETF yet: Morgan Stanley uses 0.14% fee to draw $100 million in first week
item.description: Morgan Stanley’s new MSBT fund has quickly attracted over $100 million by offering the market's lowest fees, sparking a fresh wave of competition from rivals like Goldman Sachs.

item.title: Crypto fund manager probed in the suspicious death of his fiancé’s death in Zanzibar
item.description: The couple argued according to hotel staff and were separated. Despite confirming Ashly Robinson died by suicide, police said they are still investigating her death.

item.title: Circle CEO says China could launch yuan stablecoin within 3 to 5 years as currency race heats up
item.description: The pitch is global scale for the yuan, but capital controls, offshore limits and convertibility gaps still stand in the way

item.title: South Korea to pilot tokenized deposits for government spending
item.description: The sandbox will test preset spending limits, timing controls and category restrictions for public sector expense payments.

item.title: Buying coffee with bitcoin is easy, the resulting tax burden is not
item.description: A libertarian think tank argues that treating bitcoin as a capital asset for tax purposes makes everyday payments impractical due to the complex reporting requirements.

item.title: The CLARITY Act breakthrough: Why JPMorgan says the U.S. crypto rulebook is ‘close to completion’
item.description: Analysts at the bank say negotiations for the CLARITY Act are reaching a final breakthrough as lawmakers resolve long-standing disputes over stablecoin rewards and agency oversight.

item.title: #Bitcoin is about to follow Nasdaq. The reason for this is quite simple: the correlation has been significantly strong most of the time. This period? The weakest correlation in the past 10 years. That provides a tremendous opportunity for $BTC, as it's also the low - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5Iai04c1dNOHdrOUxwejU4RDhBUTg3cnZ3V1l5ZG9JbWhrc1ZSOHBkRVZrVGd1SlFqWkZuR05xYVFyWXFZZ3RWQ0VTaGw1WjEyalFxRUlBVGlHcFZFSmxrUjY4SQ?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin is about to follow Nasd…

item.title: Bitcoin is testing a level that capped its rally in January, CryptoQuant says
item.description: Macro-driven ETF inflows have lifted prices, but CryptoQuant data signals large holders are positioning to sell near a key breakeven zone

item.title: US should scrap crypto capital gains tax to fuel currency competition: Cato
item.description: Crypto users in the US are required to pay capital gains taxes on cryptocurrencies, stifling their usefulness as a currency, argued a Washington DC-based think tank.

item.title: Trump’s World Liberty under fire for ‘absurd’ token unlock plan
item.description: Major World Liberty Financial investor Justin Sun called a plan to lock tokens for up to four years “the most absurd governance scams I have ever seen.”

item.title: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin fund overtakes WisdomTree after 6 trading days
item.description: The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust is also within striking distance of overtaking three other US spot Bitcoin ETFs that launched in January 2024.

item.title: China already has compute to train its own Mythos-like AI: Nvidia CEO
item.description: The amount of capacity and the type of compute it was trained on is “abundantly available in China,” said the Nvidia CEO.

item.title: Bitcoin's quantum debate splits as Adam Back pushes optional upgrades over forced freeze
item.description: The Blockstream CEO told Paris Blockchain Week that Bitcoin should build quantum-resistant upgrades now, a day after Jameson Lopp proposed freezing vulnerable coins instead.

item.title: Bitcoin rally is taking a breather near $75,000. Onchain data shows why
item.description: BTC is up 10% for the month, but the bull run has stalled near $75,000 in the past 48 hours. Here's why.

item.title: Dogecoin jumps 4.5% to nearly 10-cents, outperforming bitcoin and ether
item.description: Breakout backed by heavy participation and late-session buying, though weak on-chain activity raises questions over durability.

item.title: Ripple partners with Korea's Kyobo Life to tokenize government bond settlement
item.description: The deal is Ripple's first with a Korean insurer and targets near real-time settlement of Korean treasuries, though the release stops short of committing to a live volume or timeline.

item.title: Tech stocks push Nasdaq, S&P 500 to record highs as Bitcoin taps $75K
item.description: Tech stocks helped drive the Nasdaq to 24,016 and the S&P 500 to 7,022 as Bitcoin climbed nearly 10% over the past two weeks.

item.title: Bitcoin steady as S&P 500 hits record, but options market isn't buying the peace trade
item.description: Crypto's derivatives desks still want downside protection, QCP says, and long-end yields and gold aren't confirming the risk-on move.

item.title: CFTC probes oil futures trades tied to Trump's moves in Iran: Report
item.description: The CFTC is investigating trades that took place before the US delayed strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure on March 23 and agreed to a ceasefire with Iran on April 7.

item.title: Bitcoin devs bet a quantum attacker will play nice with a ‘wait and react’ plan
item.description: BitMEX Research proposes a canary system that pays a bounty to the first quantum attacker and activates a network-wide freeze, offering an alternative to a fixed five-year timeline.

item.title: BitMEX pitches ‘canary fund’ alternative to Bitcoin quantum coin freeze
item.description: It may be appropriate to attempt to mitigate the extent of the freeze as much as possible, even at the cost of greater complexity, said BitMEX.

item.title: Bitcoin $BTC is at a make-or-break point! For the third time in six months, BTC is testing the 100-day simple moving average (SMA) as resistance. • In October, Bitcoin got rejected, resulting in a 30% correction from $116,000 to $80,000. • In January, Bitcoin als - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9CNDRoWlRQOUtsVnJVeGVHZ1FDaDlONDIyTXpkSlBhMW0ySlRvNlFlLWpnTm83TVk2QmpqWHZkTWh1VW1xeW1RdkxRckMwQ3ZndndNVF9QMV90elNkN2Jz?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin $BTC is at a make-or-break poi…

item.title: ETH Rangers Program Recap
item.description: In late 2024, the Ethereum Foundation, together with Secureum, The Red Guild, and Security Alliance (SEAL), launched the ETH Rangers Program, an initiative to provide stipends for individuals doing public goods security work in the Ethereu…

item.title: Google's Latest AI Update Makes Industrial Robots Way Smarter—Here's How
item.description: The new Google Gemini Robotics AI model gives robots improved spatial reasoning and task planning abilities for industrial applications.

item.title: Will Maine Governor Janet Mills Sign Nation's First AI Data Center Ban Into Law?
item.description: Maine's moratorium on AI data centers would last for over a year. Will the governor, embroiled in a tough Senate primary, sign it into law?

item.title: JUST IN: 🇨🇳 Popular Chinese commentator 'Professor Jiang' claims Bitcoin is a "CIA operation." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5mT0FPal9ELXhDTUhSMFN3YUJVUWRRV2ZFUEtVSm4ybS01TW9FSmRHVDAweUtUa3RPZlNqMUxIMmNpTlF1X2VrYnFFU0RLXzAySF8xc3ZNNms2cXRaS0pLTm5n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇨🇳 Popular Chinese comm…

item.title: You Switched to Claude Over Surveillance Fears. Now It Wants Your Passport
item.description: Anthropic quietly rolled out government ID and selfie verification for Claude—a first among major AI chatbots, and a peculiar pivot for a company whose privacy stance just drove a record wave of users away from ChatGPT.

item.title: World Liberty Wants WLFI Locked Beyond Trump's Second Term—Investors Aren't Thrilled
item.description: World Liberty Financial's early supporters vented frustrations after the Trump-backed crypto venture released a four-year vesting schedule.

item.title: 'Killing Satoshi': $70M Bitcoin Film Starring Casey Affleck Will Make Heavy Use of AI
item.description: A $70 million feature film focusing on Bitcoin and the hunt for creator Satoshi Nakamoto will lean heavily on AI tools.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back above $75,000! 🟢 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE4zcFQ3YUg2eFBuajYyR0FTU3hISmNkYXAwdmozUk5PZWFoWXZIMXd0TVJ0cVgwcE5yYTdKTmJXeElUVEMxa3htWjY4ZkNEd3hFb0dEbkFXSmtkR3RjbktqaUZWekI2Q0U?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back…

item.title: JUST IN: Coffeezilla publishes video taking on Bitcoin believer Michael Saylor & Strategy's $STRC. Coffee says Saylor's STRC preferred-stock pitch is too simple & the risks are not properly explained. "It's been compared to the iPhone. It's been compared to a - x.com

item.title: Free Qwen Is Dead: Alibaba Shuts Down Qwen Code Free Tier
item.description: Alibaba shut down Qwen Code's free tier today, following MiniMax's license bait-and-switch. The idea that Chinese labs are the "open-source good guys" is crumbling fast.

item.title: Try a LattAI? Starbucks Debuts ChatGPT App for AI Drink Suggestions
item.description: Starbucks’ ChatGPT integration lets customers describe their mood or upload photos to receive AI-generated drink picks.
